title: Reusable Product Ad
sourceTitle: Aurora Run Lab Trail Sneaker Aero Sneaker Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable product ad poster with commercial product hero composition with strong feature focus, premium lighting, campaign typography zones, and brand-safe fictional labels. Design a striking premium vertical advertising poster (9:16 format) for a fictional ultra-limited Adidas sneaker called "ADIDAS AEROBLADE X - LIMITED. The creative direction should feel like a world-class agency campaign - original, futuristic, visually explosive. Main visual: A single hero sneaker floating center-frame, captured at a dramatic low angle as if levitating above a dark obsidian running track split; The shoe combines knit mesh, sculpted foam, translucent panels, reflective stripes, and a carbon-fiber sole plate. Product: fictional limited-edition trail sneaker with translucent sole and sculpted side panels. Fictional Brand: AURORA RUN LAB. Hero Feature: floating exploded angle showing texture, sole grip, reflective panels, and premium lacing. Campaign Headline: DROP 001: NIGHT TERRAIN. Layout Style: premium launch poster with a single oversized hero product, small spec callouts, and clean negative space. Palette: graphite black, electric cyan, white, and one sharp neon accent. Subject: Make fictional limited-edition trail sneaker with translucent sole and sculpted side panels the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in a controlled commercial launch environment with product props, premium lighting, and clean campaign space. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use premium launch poster with a single oversized hero product, small spec callouts, and clean negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in agency-grade product advertising with crisp materials, polished reflections, depth, and scroll-stopping contrast. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use graphite black, electric cyan, white, and one sharp neon accent. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
imagePrompts.title: Aurora Run Lab Trail Sneaker Aero Sneaker Ad Poster Drop 001 Night Terrain
